rationale: Vivid, clear, and well organized, with strong scene-setting and concrete details that make the workload and stakes feel real. The profile flows smoothly through a day and gives the defender depth and humanity. It loses a bit on simplicity and economy because some metaphors and descriptive flourishes are slightly over-written.
